name: cursor-translate
description: Token-saving RU→EN translation layer for Cursor IDE, CLI, and SDK

scripts.build: npm run build -w @cursor-translate/core && npm run build -w cursor-translate -w @cursor-translate/mcp
scripts.version: node scripts/sync-package-versions.mjs && npm install --package-lock-only && git add package-lock.json packages/cli/package.json packages/core/package.json packages/mcp/package.json plugin/.cursor-plugin/plugin.json
